generated_exposure.exposure_text: As a former counterterrorism analyst, I've seen firsthand how our current security laws leave gaps that terrorists exploit. The 2024 London attacks could've been prevented if agencies had better data access. We need to expand domestic security powers - responsibly, with oversight. The alternative is more preventable tragedies. #NationalSecurityMatters
